en-us.html:
He has an annoying tendency to overwhelm you with numbers.

Story

393 AC - Each time a name is called, the accountant scribbles and makes a note on his long scroll. Number of rations, amount of Kelon allocated, equipment provided… He records who is assigned where and notes the headcount for each team. We need these detailed accounts to streamline our logistics. Not many know this, but the Storhvit expedition was costly. We had to stretch ourselves to the limit and optimize gear allocation based on needs while scrutinizing each mission to provide only what was strictly necessary. We consciously refrained from asking for Asgartha's support, as that could have painted the Rediscovery Endeavor as too much of a financial drain. And we can't afford those optics with elections on the horizon. We need to stack all the odds in our favor, even if that means tightening our belts. Even if that means making some expeditions harder, or even putting them in danger.

And I'd had to make lots of concessions. The fact that Sigismar had used his connections to tighten Isura's purse strings hadn't helped. But thanks to Mack, I'd had the time to make arrangements and adapt my complex financial package, through alternative subsidy sources and by drawing on my own funds where needed. I couldn't really blame him, actually. He thought he was doing the right thing, and was unaware that I was diverting some of the capital to achieve Avkan's dream. But that didn't stop us from being close to bankruptcy… I sigh. As the treasurer continues to meticulously inventory the expenses, I have an uncomfortable feeling that I'm missing something, or that I'm forgetting something crucial. I mutter to myself and try as best I can to set that nagging feeling aside.

Narrator

WARU

blocks.text: He has an annoying tendency to overwhelm you with numbers.

paragraphs: 393 AC - Each time a name is called, the accountant scribbles and makes a note on his long scroll. Number of rations, amount of Kelon allocated, equipment provided… He records who is assigned where and notes the headcount for each team. We need these detailed accounts to streamline our logistics. Not many know this, but the Storhvit expedition was costly. We had to stretch ourselves to the limit and optimize gear allocation based on needs while scrutinizing each mission to provide only what was strictly necessary. We consciously refrained from asking for Asgartha's support, as that could have painted the Rediscovery Endeavor as too much of a financial drain. And we can't afford those optics with elections on the horizon. We need to stack all the odds in our favor, even if that means tightening our belts. Even if that means making some expeditions harder, or even putting them in danger.

And I'd had to make lots of concessions. The fact that Sigismar had used his connections to tighten Isura's purse strings hadn't helped. But thanks to Mack, I'd had the time to make arrangements and adapt my complex financial package, through alternative subsidy sources and by drawing on my own funds where needed. I couldn't really blame him, actually. He thought he was doing the right thing, and was unaware that I was diverting some of the capital to achieve Avkan's dream. fr-fr.html:
Il a une fâcheuse tendance à vous assommer de chiffres.

Histoire

393 AC - À chaque fois qu'une personne est appelée, le comptable annote et griffonne sur son long rouleau. Nombre de rations, quantité de Kélon allouée, matériel fourni... Il consigne qui est affecté où, dresse le détail des effectifs de chaque équipée. Nous avons besoin de ce décompte exhaustif, afin de rationaliser nos efforts logistiques. Peu le savent, mais la traversée du Storhvit a été coûteuse. Il a fallu tirer sur la corde, optimiser les allocations de matériel en fonction des besoins, en étudiant chaque mission pour ne fournir que le strict nécessaire. Nous nous sommes consciemment retenus de demander le soutien d'Asgartha. Le faire aurait voulu dire prendre le risque que l'Effort de Redécouverte ne soit vu que comme un gouffre financier. Et cela, nous ne pouvons nous le permettre alors que se préparent les élections. Nous nous devons de mettre toutes les chances de notre côté, même si cela veut dire se serrer la ceinture. Même si cela veut dire mettre quelques expéditions en difficulté, voire en danger.

Et j'avais dû faire bien des concessions. Le fait que Sigismar ait fait jouer ses relations pour resserrer les cordons de la bourse de l'Isura n'avait pas aidé. Heureusement, grâce à Mack, j'avais eu le temps de prendre mes dispositions et d'adapter mon complexe montage financier, que ce soit par le biais de sources de subvention alternatives ou en puisant dans mes fonds propres, le cas échéant. Je ne pouvais pas lui en vouloir, au final. Il croyait bien faire, et ignorait que je détournais certains capitaux pour les réinjecter dans le rêve d'Avkan. Mais cela n'empêchait pas que nous étions passés très près de la banqueroute... Je soupire. Alors que le trésorier continue d'inventorier méticuleusement les dépenses, j'ai la désagréable sensation qu'un élément m'échappe, ou d'avoir oublié quelque chose de crucial. Je grommelle, et essaie tant bien que mal de mettre cette idée fixe et tenace de côté.

Narré par

WARU

blocks.text: Il a une fâcheuse tendance à vous assommer de chiffres.
